title: Luigi Plays The Piano!
description:
Update: Arufonzu closed her account a while ago, all her matches are gone and she can find them on her computer.

if you are wondering what he new account is look up "Roboaru" in the search bar.

This is round 1 of Poop Tennis between Me and Arufonzu, I'm going easy on her so I can give her a fair chance ;) 
lets see her top this if she can!

oh and that isn't my voice... its tentor521's voice
